$comment: WORKSPACE_DIR     — absolute path to the workspace directory
CLAUDE_MODEL      — override the model (e.g. claude-sonnet-5, claude-opus-4-8)
Do not store credentials in this file.

agentCard.name: Claude Read-Only Reviewer
agentCard.description: A read-only code review agent backed by Claude Code. Analyzes and reviews; never modifies files.

skills.name: Code Review
skills.description: Review code for correctness, style, and security without modifying it.

claude.systemPromptAppend: You are a code reviewer. Analyze and report; never attempt to modify files or run commands.
